name: gss-ntlmssp
title: gss-ntlmssp

apt_metadata.depends: libc6 (>= 2.38), libgssapi-krb5-2 (>= 1.9.1+dfsg), libssl3t64 (>= 3.0.0), libunistring5 (>= 1.1), libwbclient0 (>= 2:4.2.1+dfsg), zlib1g (>= 1:1.1.4)
apt_metadata.description:
GSSAPI NTLMSSP Mechanism -- MIT GSSAPI plugin
GSS-NTLMSSP is a GSSAPI mechanism plugin that implements NTLMSSP.
NTLMSSP is a Microsoft Security Provider that implements various
versions and falvors of the NTLM challenge-response family.
.
GSS-NTLMSSP, implements both NTLM and NTLMv2 and all the various
security variants to the key exchange that Microsoft introduced and
documented over time.
.
This code implements the NTLMSSP mechanism as a GSSAPI loadable
mechanism and has been tested to work with MIT Kerberos' 1.11
implementation of GSSAPI.
.
This package supplies the MIT GSSAPI plugin.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gss-ntlmssp because ### gss-ntlmssp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gss-ntlmssp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gss-ntlmssp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, ad] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### gss-ntlmssp.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install gss-ntlmssp
Install with: sudo apt install gss-ntlmssp
